Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Arelius family]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Arelius family is a faction from the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius family has an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family is on their way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Arelius family is expected to arrive at the Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Arelius are arriving soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Arelius family is approaching with black crescent banners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Arelius is a person Ragahn mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is the heir to the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — The Arelius family's symbol is a black crescent moon.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Arelius family is noted for having honor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon claims to have no voice in the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has joined the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Arelius family provides support to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Arelius family has colors flown on cloudships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Arelius family employs hundreds of thousands of people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is not a subject of the Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Arelius family colors are dark blue and white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Arelius family is a group that Lindon serves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Arelius family members can detect threats even with their eyes closed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius family uses a crest featuring blue, black, and white banners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius family greets the Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius family is a major servant family, subject only to the great clans of the empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family possesses a single most valuable object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family uses their bloodline powers to find areas needing cleaning or maintenance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family may have information on Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family has sealed a descendant of the ancient dragons in a cave within the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Arelius family has branch heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Arelius family can hear and see through powers of madra and aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Arelius family is mentioned in the context of street-sweeping crews.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Arelius family has blue-clad servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan handles the bulk of Arelius affairs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Cassias is a member of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius family has not healed Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius family is a family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius family is being sabotaged by the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Jai clan attempts to sabotage Arelius street crews under cover of night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius family defends and maintains the Blackflame Trials course.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan was on the roof of an Arelius family tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Arelius family has new recruits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Wei Shi Lindon is on Arelius family business.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon can be found at the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Arelius family is a point of interest for Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Orthos is an Arelius turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Naru Huan planned to visit the Arelius family personally.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Daishou stole a severed head from a servant of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Daishou intends to steer the Deepwalker Ape toward the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — An Arelius sees things using physical senses rather than spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos is the guardian of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Arelius is a name associated with Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Naru Gwei tells Arelius he must do his duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan hoped to reap benefits for the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Arelius family is ranked number one among the major families in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius family maintains the cloudship Sky's Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Arelius family rewards employees who provide benefits beyond their job scope.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Living in the Arelius family could lead to being Highgold by twenty-five.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon considers staying with the Arelius family to be a smart choice for getting stronger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Arelius family is being sent home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Arelius bloodline possesses a powerful scouting tool via spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Arelius family is expected to replace the Jai clan in the ranks of the great clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius family has lost territory to bloodspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Arelius family uses wax seals marked with a crescent symbol and ancient characters to send messages.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Arelius family has administrative centers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family could not afford meat of the quality found in Silverfang Carp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — A void key is worth as much as half of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan is an Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook addresses Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius bloodline has a specific ability.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon and his companions intended to contact the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Arelius family has yet to rise to its place in the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lezaar is a refiner of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius family has small contingents of servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan may work for the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The Arelius family commands the cleaning crews and maintenance workers across the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — A servant delivered food to Eithan in Arelius colors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Arelius clan is in mourning over the loss of their Monarch.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — An Arelius clan Underlord guided Lindon's development of a pure madra Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — House Arelius is located on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The Arelius teams do not clap for the Monarch.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's perception training was intended to help her keep up with an Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Arelius family is mentioned by Yan Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Arelius family sent a gift to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage ordered Arelius to move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The dark blue color of the cloudship's base represents the Arelius family.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Arelius family has a crest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Arelius family had pushed the Jai clan out of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The Arelius clan uses a moon crest as their symbol.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Two members of Lindon's team are only part of the Arelius clan in name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The Arelius presence is felt through Eithan's actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan's clothes bear the Arelius clan symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon questions if the Arelius clan built the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Arelius is mentioned in relation to Reigan Shen.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Arelius family founder was the interdimensional god of death.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias Arelius is an Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Arelius family is involved in a distant clash on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Arelius troops are involved in the battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Arelius clan has made a home among ruins and half-standing walls.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Arelius clan is a blond and smug group.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
